# dv.manager

**dv.manager** package is designed to make it quick and easy to create
and deploy Shiny applications using the modules from DaVinci.

![](reference/figures/modmanager.png)

# Installation

``` r

if (!require("remotes")) install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("Boehringer-Ingelheim/dv.manager")
```

# Package index

## Run application

- [`run_app()`](run_app.md) : Run the Shiny Application

## Utils

- [`tab_group()`](tab_group.md) : Create a Tabbed Shiny Module
  Collection
- [`add_date_range()`](add_date_range.md) : Add a date_range attribute
  to a dataset
- [`log_activate()`](logging.md) [`log_deactivate()`](logging.md)
  [`log_default_handlers()`](logging.md) [`log_add_date()`](logging.md)
  [`log_add_short_sess_id()`](logging.md)
  [`log_test_level()`](logging.md) [`log_format()`](logging.md)
  [`log_add_sess_id()`](logging.md) [`log_add_ns()`](logging.md)
  [`log_get_level_list()`](logging.md) [`log_use_log()`](logging.md) :
  logger

## Dummy modules

- [`simple_UI()`](mod_simple.md) [`simple_server()`](mod_simple.md)
  [`mod_simple()`](mod_simple.md) : A simple module that counts the
  number of rows
